\tzpentry{ID3714}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3714 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ ds^2=(R+r\cos\theta)^2d\phi^2 + r^2 d\theta^2. \]
